functional_requirements.requirement: Allow individual counsellors to remain in contact with all individual students as well as parents.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: counselling is an important aspect for the students of the current technological generation as an individual counsellor may remain in contact with all individual students as well as parents.

functional_requirements.requirement: Simplify the process and reduce manual paperwork.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Student Counselling Management System will simplify the process and reduce the manual paperwork.

functional_requirements.requirement: Automate the manual process to a computerized system.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: making complete atomization of manual process to computerized system

functional_requirements.requirement: Design a system to rationalize admission to particular courses in a university/institution.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: The main objective of the Student Counselling Management System is to design a system to rationalize the admission to particular courses in a university/institution.

functional_requirements.requirement: Allow students to register for counselling if they are eligible.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: Through this system, the student will be able to register for counselling if he is eligible.

functional_requirements.requirement: Provide information regarding colleges and universities where a student can apply.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: If the student is qualifying the criteria then he will get the information regarding the colleges and the universities in which he can apply.

functional_requirements.requirement: Generate reports based on student's merit list.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: report generation based on student’s merit list

functional_requirements.requirement: Provide information regarding available seats in the institution.
functional_requirements.evidence_quote: A student can also get the information regarding how many seats have been booked and vacant seats available in the institution (Figures 29.1–29.8)

prompt:
You are a requirements engineer.
Extract functional software requirements from the source text.

Return ONLY valid JSON with this schema:
{
  "functional_requirements": [
    {
      "requirement": "string",
      "evidence_quote": "short exact quote from source text"
    }
  ]
}

Rules:
1. Include only system capabilities/behaviors.
2. Exclude background context, impact statements, problem motivation, and pure business goals.
3. Keep each requirement atomic and clear.
4. Preserve original meaning. Do not invent functionality.
5. If uncertain, keep the item but keep evidence_quote explicit.

Source text:
<<<
The first phase of a person’s life is confined mainly by education and training. Hence, counselling is an important aspect for the students of the current technological generation as an individual counsellor may remain in contact with all individual students as well as parents. Student
Counselling Management System will simplify the process and reduce the manual paperwork.
It is used to smoothen the work of each counsellor who is facing problems currently, and making complete atomization of manual process to computerized system. The main objective of the
Student Counselling Management System is to design a system to rationalize the admission to
particular courses in a university/institution. Through this system, the student will be able to
register for counselling if he is eligible. If the student is qualifying the criteria then he will get the
information regarding the colleges and the universities in which he can apply. The main features
are online admission, report generation based on student’s merit list and keeping track of counselling procedures and finally publishing results. A student can also get the information regarding
how many seats have been booked and vacant seats available in the institution (Figures 29.1–29.8).
>>>
